rulings.Case Title: HENRY GORING VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Gerald Levine, M.D. And Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, May 18, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiff¿s motion to compel the deposition of Gerald Levine, M.D. and production of documents is denied without prejudice to re-filing the motion in the event that Dr. Levine is not designated as an expert. Plaintiff is entitled to take the deposition of Dr. Levine. The only issue is timing and whether plaintiff should be allowed to take more than one deposition or Dr. Levine. No good cause has been shown why the information that plaintiff now seeks cannot be obtained later in a single deposition at a time when it is known whether or not Dr. Levine will be designated as a defense expert. The foregoing is not intended to be a ruling on what may or may not be asked of Dr. Levine when his deposition takes place. = (220/HEK)
